hero.subtitle: Decades of learning science, AI, and social psychology — engineered into one platform that makes deep, lasting learning the default.
hero.trust: Free to start · Earn-Back on completion · No card required

principles.title: Not another video library
principles.subtitle: Every feature is a behavioral mechanism — engineered to change how much you remember and how far you get.

recall.title: Active recall, by default
recall.body: Quizzes before and after every lesson turn passive watching into durable memory.

spaced.title: Spaced repetition
spaced.body: Smart revisit reminders bring lessons back at the moment you're about to forget.

earnback.title: Earn-Back program
earnback.body: Commit to a deadline. Finish what you start, and earn back what you paid.

cohorts.title: Learn in cohorts
cohorts.body: Peer groups, group tasks, and visible progress make momentum social.

pacing.title: Adaptive pacing
pacing.body: The platform reads your velocity and consistency, then meets you where you are.

growth.title: Growth, not grades
growth.body: We show you how far you've grown — not a cold score out of ten.

visual.title: Memory retention over time
visual.aria: Memory retention: spaced recall versus the forgetting curve

academies.title: One platform, many academies
academies.subtitle: Interchangeable sub-platforms, each powered by the same behavioral engine. Teacher Academy is live today.

teacher.name: Teacher Academy
teacher.blurb: Master the craft of teaching with behavior-driven courses and cohorts.

tech.name: Tech Academy
tech.blurb: Hands-on engineering tracks with an in-browser code sandbox.

business.name: Business Academy
business.blurb: Practical business and leadership skills for the real world.

corporate.name: Corporate Academy
corporate.blurb: Team training and upskilling for organizations at scale.

visual.aria: One platform core connected to four academies

goal.title: Pick a goal
goal.body: Choose a course, path, or cohort and set a personal completion deadline.

learn.title: Learn the right way
learn.body: Micro-lessons, recall quizzes, projects, and peer cohorts keep you moving.

finish.title: Finish & earn back
finish.body: Complete on time, earn your certificate — and earn back what you committed.

one.quote: I finally finished a course instead of abandoning it at 20%. The Earn-Back deadline kept me honest.
one.name: Adaeze O.

two.quote: The recall quizzes before each lesson are uncomfortable in the best way. I actually remember things now.
two.name: Tunde A.

three.quote: My cohort group chat is the reason I showed up every week. Learning felt like a team sport.
three.name: Grace M.

lesson.label: Max lesson length — built for focus

cta.title: Ready to learn the way your brain actually works?
cta.subtitle: Join free, pick your first course, and set a commitment you'll be proud to keep.
